---
title: "Contents of This Website"
---

1. PeMS Data

    - [PeMS 1](pems1.html)
    - [PeMS 2](pems2.html)

2. Model Properties

    - [Model Properties 1](model_prop1.html)
    - [Model Properties 2](model_prop2.html)
    - [Model Properties 3](model_prop3.html)
    - [Model Properties 4](model_prop4.html)

3. Basis Functions

    - [Basis Functions](graphs1.html)

4. Approximation

    - [Approximation](approximation.html)

5. Numerical Error

    - [Numerical Error](num_error.html)

6. Convergence Rates

    - [Convergence Rates](conv_rates.html)
    
7. Simulation study

    - [Simulation Study](sim_study.html)
    
8. Additional Illustrations

    - [Additional Illustrations](mplots.html)
